generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are actually benefiting more from our defense commitments than we are? A recent study found that while we spend billions on maintaining our alliances, many of our partners are not pulling their weight. For example, only 3 out of 10 allies meet the agreed-upon spending targets. This imbalance puts an unfair burden on our taxpayers. It's time to reassess our commitments and ensure that our national security comes first. #AllianceCommitment #NationalSecurity
